Server function for the editable table Shiny module

Source: R/editable_table_server.R
editable_table_server.Rd

Renders a reactable table with one inline Shiny input per col_spec column per row. When row_spec$selectable is TRUE, a checkbox column is prepended and clicking anywhere in a row toggles that row's selection.

Usage

editable_table_server(
  id,
  data_r,
  row_spec,
  col_spec,
  existing_data_r = NULL,
  reactable_options = list()
)

Arguments

id

A string. The module namespace ID.

data_r

A reactive data frame containing at least the columns declared in row_spec.

row_spec

A validated row_spec list (see validate_row_spec).

col_spec

A validated col_spec list (see validate_col_spec).

existing_data_r

A reactive data frame of previously saved values, or NULL (default) for a blank start.

reactable_options

A plain list of additional arguments passed to reactable::reactable(). Module-controlled arguments (data, columns, onClick) are protected and cannot be overridden. Defaults that can be overridden include sortable, pagination, highlight, bordered, and striped.

Value

A named list of two reactives:

current_data

A reactive tibble with id_col + one column per col_spec entry, updated continuously as the user interacts.

selected_ids

A reactive vector of id_col values for checked rows. NULL when row_spec$selectable is not TRUE.

Details

A Reset button wipes all inputs and clears all selections.
